Generative AI.description: The system may produce unsupported, incomplete, or incorrect information.
Generative AI.mitigation: Use grounded sources, citations, evaluation thresholds, user warnings, and human review.

Generative AI.description: Sensitive information may be disclosed through prompts, retrieved context, logs, or generated text.
Generative AI.mitigation: Apply data classification, access control, redaction, retention limits, and approved-data controls.

Computer vision.description: The system may fail to identify defects or may incorrectly classify acceptable items.
Computer vision.mitigation: Use representative evaluation data, failure-mode testing, confidence thresholds, and human-in-the-loop review.

Predictive analytics.description: Historical training data may perpetuate systematic bias or unequal outcomes across groups.
Predictive analytics.mitigation: Perform demographic parity checks, feature attribution audits, and routine bias mitigation tests.

Predictive analytics.description: Model accuracy degrades over time due to shifting underlying data patterns.
Predictive analytics.mitigation: Implement continuous data drift monitoring, automated retraining pipelines, and performance alerts.

Intelligent automation.description: Process failures or API downtime disrupt downstream automated workflows.
Intelligent automation.mitigation: Build fallback procedures, queue monitoring, transaction retries, and alert thresholds.

Intelligent automation.description: Autonomous decisions execute without sufficient human validation for edge cases.
Intelligent automation.mitigation: Set clear escalation boundaries, human-approval checkpoints, and operational override options.

Optimization.description: Adversarial input manipulation leads to suboptimal or compromised decisions.
Optimization.mitigation: Enforce input sanitization, API authentication, threat modeling, and anomaly detection.

Natural-language processing.description: Complex language embeddings obscure clear reasoning behind classification outputs.
Natural-language processing.mitigation: Provide confidence scores, key-phrase highlights, and decision audit logs.

Other.description: Evolving legal standards or sector guidance create compliance gaps.
Other.mitigation: Perform legal alignment reviews, maintain risk documentation, and track regulatory updates.
